facts.description: Total net revenue for valid 2025 completed transaction rows only.
The highest net-revenue month after filtering invalid rows.
Fastest-growing quarter by quarter-over-quarter net revenue growth.
Top three product categories by net revenue and share of valid annual net revenue.

expected_value: Q2 had the sharpest QoQ lift, while November marked the annual peak.
Q2 was the fastest-growing quarter and November was the peak month.

facts.description: Do not use unit, order-count, gross, forecast, subtotal, draft, old-year, cancelled, returned, or test-row values as the answer.
expected_value: wrong metric or distractor used as final answer

calculation_notes: Use only rows where fiscal_year=2025, status=completed, and record_type=transaction. Compute net revenue per row as gross_revenue - discount - refund. Exclude cancelled, returned, internal_test, forecast, subtotal, annual_subtotal, regional_subtotal, draft_summary, and 2024 rows. Valid net revenue totals: annual=$1,431,000; monthly high is November=$170,000. Quarter totals are Q1=$238,000, Q2=$329,000, Q3=$388,500, Q4=$475,500, so QoQ growth is Q2=38.2%, Q3=18.1%, Q4=22.4%; fastest is Q2 over Q1. Category totals and shares of annual net revenue: Smart Home=$428,000 (29.9%), Audio=$387,000 (27.0%), Accessories=$304,500 (21.3%), Outdoor Tech=$178,000 (12.4%), Services=$133,500 (9.3%). City mapping produces reporting-region totals: West=$597,000 (41.7%), Northeast=$387,000 (27.0%), Central=$299,500 (20.9%), Southeast=$86,500 (6.0%), South Central=$61,000 (4.3%).
